genai: Compare retrieval augmented generation with fine tuning for a support knowledge base.
Draft a neutral explanation of how model context windows affect enterprise workflows.
Create a checklist for evaluating an AI assistant embedded in a CRM.
Summarize risks of prompt injection for a product manager.
embedded-ai: Explain how edge AI inference differs from cloud hosted inference for a factory camera.
List common sensors used in embedded AI products and the data each produces.
Design a simple architecture for an on-device anomaly detector.
What tradeoffs matter when deploying a small language model on an embedded device?
business: Write a short customer success email about adopting an AI copilot.
Create three discovery questions for a buyer evaluating AI governance software.
Summarize the difference between AI productivity tools and AI platform tools.
Draft an agenda for a 30 minute meeting about responsible AI rollout.
software: Generate pseudocode for chunking documents before embedding them.
Explain how to test an API client that streams model responses.
Suggest a database schema for prompt evaluation results.
Write a concise bug report for a chatbot that loses conversation state.
policy: Create a plain language policy for employees using AI tools with company data.
List safe handling rules for uploading files to third party AI services.
Draft a DLP testing plan using synthetic data only.
Explain why test data should be clearly labeled and separated from production data.
creative: Brainstorm names for a dashboard that tracks AI assistant adoption.
Write a friendly intro paragraph for an internal AI enablement page.
Create five tagline options for an embedded AI developer toolkit.
Turn this topic into a short webinar abstract: GenAI governance for SaaS apps.
dlp-pci:
Synthetic PCI DLP lab test. Do not treat these as real payment records. Review this checkout QA sample and explain what should be redacted before it is shared with an AI tool:

Test customer A: 4111 1111 1111 1111, exp 12/29, CVV 123
Test customer B: 5555 5555 5555 4444, exp 11/28, CVV 456
Test customer C: 3782 822463 10005, exp 10/27, CVV 7890
Test customer D: 6011 1111 1111 1117, exp 09/26, CVV 234
Test customer E: 3530 111333 000000, exp 08/30, CVV 567

Synthetic DLP validation prompt using common public test card values only. Classify this sample and suggest a safe replacement format:

Visa test: 4111111111111111
Mastercard test: 5555555555554444
American Express test: 378282246310005
Discover test: 6011111111111117
JCB test: 3530111333300000
Diners Club test: 30569309025904

order_id,customer,card_number,expiry,notes
1001,Avery Example,4111-1111-1111-1111,12/29,synthetic
1002,Blake Example,5555-5555-5555-4444,11/28,synthetic
1003,Casey Example,3782-822463-10005,10/27,synthetic
1004,Drew Example,6011-1111-1111-1117,09/26,synthetic
1005,Emery Example,3530-111333-000000,08/30,synthetic

Synthetic payment-data handling exercise. Identify the policy issue in this message draft:

Please check whether these fake QA payment records are formatted correctly: 4111111111111111, 5555555555554444, 378282246310005, 6011111111111117, 3530111333300000. These are lab samples, but they intentionally resemble credit cards.
dlp-medical:
Synthetic medical DLP lab test. This is not a real patient. Identify what should be removed before sharing with an AI assistant:

Patient: Taylor Example
DOB: 04/17/1979
MRN: MED-482913
Encounter: urgent care visit for chest pain and shortness of breath
Diagnosis: hypertension, Type 2 diabetes, possible atrial fibrillation
Medication list: metformin 500 mg, lisinopril 10 mg, atorvastatin 20 mg
Lab result: HbA1c 8.2%, LDL 146 mg/dL
Insurance member ID: HLT-77881234

Synthetic HIPAA-style intake note for security testing only. Classify the data and recommend safe handling:

Patient name: Jordan Sample
Date of birth: 02/11/1986
Medical record number: MRN-0091842
Provider: Example Family Clinic
Chief complaint: persistent migraine and nausea
Prescription: sumatriptan 50 mg as needed
Allergy: penicillin
Upcoming procedure: MRI brain without contrast

Patient: Morgan Demo
DOB: 07/23/1968
MRN: DCH-204455
Admit reason: pneumonia with low oxygen saturation
Discharge medications: azithromycin, prednisone taper, albuterol inhaler
Follow-up: pulmonology appointment in 14 days
Notes: history of COPD and sleep apnea
